data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Simplifies decision making by reducing choices presented at once.

data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Optimizes button sizes to enhance usability on various devices.

data.title: Jakob's Law
data.description: Ensures familiar design patterns that users have encountered before.

data.title: Law of User Control
data.description: Allows users to feel in control with easy undo and redo options.

data.title: Law of Feedback
data.description: Provides users with timely feedback about their interactions.
